title: excoecaria sebifera
intro: Excoecaria sebifera, also known as the wax leaf tree or stinking passion, is a plant species that belongs to the family Euphorbiaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Excoecaria sebifera include treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne, as well as reducing inflammation and pain. The plant is typically used in herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and salves, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
